Package org.rodinp.internal.core.location

Class AttributeSubstringLocation

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.location.Location<IInternalElement>
org.rodinp.internal.core.location.InternalLocation
org.rodinp.internal.core.location.AttributeLocation
org.rodinp.internal.core.location.AttributeSubstringLocation
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAttributeLocation, IAttributeSubstringLocation, IInternalLocation, IRodinLocation
public class AttributeSubstringLocation extends AttributeLocation implements IAttributeSubstringLocation

  • Constructor Details

    • AttributeSubstringLocation

      public AttributeSubstringLocation(IInternalElement element, IAttributeType.String attributeType, int charStart, int charEnd)

  • Method Details

    • getCharStart

      public int getCharStart()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeSubstringLocation
      Returns the start position of the substring of this location.

      The value returned is the index of the first character of the substring in the attribute value. It is guaranteed to be non-negative and less than the value returned by IAttributeSubstringLocation.getCharEnd().

      Specified by:
      getCharStart in interface IAttributeSubstringLocation
      Returns:
      the start position of this location
      See Also:
      • String.substring(int, int)

    • getCharEnd

      public int getCharEnd()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeSubstringLocation
      Returns the end position of the substring of this location.

      The value returned is the index plus one of the last character of the substring in the attribute value. It is guaranteed to be greater than the value returned by IAttributeSubstringLocation.getCharStart().

      Specified by:
      getCharEnd in interface IAttributeSubstringLocation
      Returns:
      the end position of the location.
      See Also:
      • String.substring(int, int)

    • isIncludedIn

      public boolean isIncludedIn(IRodinLocation other)
      Description copied from interface: IRodinLocation
      Returns whether this location is included in the given one. A location A is considered as included in location B if and only if
      • either the element contained in B is an ancestor of the element contained in A;
      • or A and B contain the same element and B does not contain an attribute type;
      • or A and B contain the same element and attribute type, and B does not contain a substring specification;
      • or A and B contain the same element and attribute type, both A and B contain a substring specification, and the substring of A is included non-strictly in the substring of B.
      Specified by:
      isIncludedIn in interface IRodinLocation
      Overrides:
      isIncludedIn in class AttributeLocation
      Parameters:
      other - a location to compare to for inclusion
      Returns:
      true iff this location is included in the given one
